---
title: "Track III: Transform and model"
format: html
---

# Instructions

For this final milestone, apply what you have learned about data transformation and modeling to further explore the auto insurance data set. Consider the following steps:

1. Read in your data
2. Wrangle your data so it is in a format that is ready for modeling
3. Create a simple regression model and inspect your model results using functions from the broom package

For example, you might build a linear regression model that uses vehicle exposure and driver age group to predict total claim amount, and then use the broom package to inspect the model estimates and generate predictions.

To learn more about the variables contained in the data set, refer to the data dictionary: https://rstudio.github.io/academy-tidyverse-auto-insurance/assets/auto-insurance_dictionary.html

# Milestone

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# loading packages
library(tidyverse)
```

## Transform and model
